summary: Reaction Reversion and Gesture Collision Fix - All 6 features verified working via Playwright tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js lines 387-423: handleShakaTapToggle correctly implements reversion logic - checks for non-Shaka reaction and clears it via API
Feed.js lines 23-68: ReactionIcon component uses spring animation (cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275)) and key prop to force re-render on change
Feed.js lines 425-466: Gesture collision handling properly distinguishes quick tap (<500ms) from long press (>=500ms)
Feed.js lines 451-454: Menu stays open after release - longPressTriggeredRef.current check returns early, preventing menu close
Feed.js lines 129-138: ReactionOverlay component correctly closes menu on tap outside
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 reaction features verified working: (1) tap on active non-Shaka reaction reverts to Shaka, (2) spring animation present in CSS, (3) quick tap triggers toggle, (4) long press opens menu, (5) menu stays open after release, (6) menu closes on emoji select or outside tap.

tap_reverts_non_shaka_to_shaka.description: When user taps on active non-Shaka reaction (e.g., ❤️), icon reverts to default Shaka. Tested with heart emoji reverting to Shaka.

spring_animation_css.description: ReactionIcon uses cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) for 0.3s spring animation on both directions (icon change and reversion)

quick_tap_triggers_toggle.description: Quick tap (<500ms) triggers toggle logic without opening menu. Tested quick tap reverting ❤️ to Shaka, then wave to Shaka.

long_press_opens_menu.description: Long press (>=500ms) opens reaction picker menu with 4 emojis (🤙🌊❤️🔥)

menu_stays_open_after_release.description: Reaction menu STAYS OPEN after finger/mouse release - longPressTriggeredRef prevents closure

menu_closes_on_select_or_outside.description: Menu closes when emoji is selected or when clicking outside on the overlay

test_methodology.quick_tap_test: Simple click on like button, verified icon state change in HTML
test_methodology.long_press_test: JavaScript dispatched mousedown → 600ms wait → mouseup events
test_methodology.menu_stays_open_test: Verified picker element present after release
test_methodology.close_on_select_test: Clicked wave emoji, verified picker disappeared
test_methodology.close_on_outside_test: Clicked on overlay element with force=True, verified picker disappeared

detailed_test_results.test_2_quick_tap_revert: After quick tap: ❤️ → Shaka (1f919 in HTML, no ❤️)
detailed_test_results.test_3_long_press_menu: pickerFound: true, overlayFound: true after 600ms long press
detailed_test_results.test_4_menu_stays_open: Picker element still present 500ms after release
detailed_test_results.test_5_select_wave: Wave (🌊) selected, menu closed, icon showed 🌊
detailed_test_results.test_6_wave_to_shaka_revert: Quick tap on 🌊 reverted to Shaka
